name: PhotoSwipe
when_to_use: 需要对技术截图或高分辨率图片做移动端手势缩放、惯性平移与全屏逐张检查时用它而非手写 lightbox,因为原生在多指缩放几何、拖拽边界和转场手势竞争上失败;非做静态缩略图 gallery。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能拼出带上一张/下一张按钮的遮罩层,做不到稳定的双指缩放、惯性、响应式 srcset 与无障碍焦点管理;PhotoSwipe 把这些能力收敛为精确的图片 dataSource。

data_in.note: data_in.items 直接传给 PhotoSwipe core 的 dataSource;图片必须预先给出固有 width/height,不要等加载后再猜尺寸。

items.width: positive integer —— 图片固有宽度
items.height: positive integer —— 图片固有高度
items.srcset?: string —— 原生 img srcset 语法,默认不提供
items.msrc?: string —— 低清占位图 URL,默认不提供

schema.index?: non-negative integer —— 初始图片下标,默认 0
schema.loop?: boolean —— 默认 true,少于 3 张时上游自动禁用循环

example._why_no_minimal: 图片项只有 src/width/height 三个必填字段且直接对应上游 dataSource,裁剪 schema 足够一次拼对;只保留空态 fixture。

items.alt: River winding through a forested mountain valley
A brown bear resting on rocky ground in daylight
Waterfall cascading down a green forested cliff

uplink: display/local-interact 类默认无需上行;当前图片下标若需外传,由消费 AI 直接读取 pswp.currIndex 并按载体处理,不预设事件出口。

carriers.widget: conditional:必须按 boot 把 photoswipe.css 与 appendToEl 都放入 shadowRoot;远程图片 URL 仍须获宿主 img-src/CORS 许可
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + CSS + Pointer Events;远程图片源须可加载

isolation.evidence: PhotoSwipe defaults to appending its scaffold to document.body, but the `appendToEl` option (boot sets it to the shadow host) redirects that single body-append into the shadow root — so no body mutation under the prescribed boot. No head/style injection (CSS external; widget boot loads photoswipe.css into shadowRoot). Binds 2 document + 4 window listeners via its tracked events helper (document keydown for keyboard nav; window resize/scroll) — all removed on close/destroy (events.removeAll), so no leak when lifecycle is honored.

en.when_to_use: Use it to inspect technical screenshots or high-resolution images one by one with mobile pinch zoom, inertial panning, and fullscreen viewing instead of writing a lightbox by hand, which fails at multi-touch zoom geometry, drag boundaries, and competing transition gestures. Not for a static thumbnail gallery.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only assemble an overlay with previous/next buttons and cannot provide stable pinch zoom, inertia, responsive srcset, or accessible focus management; PhotoSwipe reduces these capabilities to an exact image dataSource.

data_in.note: data_in.items is passed directly to PhotoSwipe core's dataSource; every image must provide intrinsic width/height in advance rather than guessing after load.

items.srcset?: string -- Native img srcset syntax; omitted by default
items.msrc?: string -- Low-resolution placeholder URL; omitted by default

schema.index?: non-negative integer -- Initial image index; default 0
schema.loop?: boolean -- Default true; upstream disables looping automatically with fewer than 3 images
